growth_records.strain: Natural community, Labrador Sea Water (LSW), ~2000 m depth, North Atlantic
growth_records.cite: Srivastava, Abhishek et al. Interplay between autotrophic and heterotrophic prokaryotic metabolism in the bathypelagic realm revealed by metatranscriptomic analyses. Microbiome (2023). DOI:10.1186/s40168-023-01688-7. [PMC10625248]
growth_records.snippet: the thiosulfate amendment resulted in an approximately fourfold (2.2 µmol C m−3 d−1) increase in DIC fixation compared to the unamended control treatment (0.6 µmol C m−3 d−1)
growth_records.notes: Control (unamended) bathypelagic prokaryotic community DIC (inorganic carbon) fixation = 0.6 umol C m^-3 d^-1, measured by 14C-bicarbonate uptake over 72 h dark incubation (Fig 1; mean of 3 replicate bottles). Volumetric community-level rate, NOT per-biomass and NOT a single strain, so not directly normalizable to mmol/gDW/h. In situ temperature/pH not numerically stated in text. Ammonium (10 uM) and sulfite (1 uM) amendments gave no significant DIC-fixation stimulation vs control (t-test p>0.49 and p>0.63); numeric values for those not given in text (Fig 1 only).

growth_records.strain: Natural community, Labrador Sea Water (LSW), ~2000 m depth, North Atlantic

up.units: uM (added, not a measured uptake rate)
up.method: amended at 1 uM; oxidation inferred from sox/dsr transcript upregulation up to 2-3 fold

growth_records.cite: Srivastava, Abhishek et al. Interplay between autotrophic and heterotrophic prokaryotic metabolism in the bathypelagic realm revealed by metatranscriptomic analyses. Microbiome (2023). DOI:10.1186/s40168-023-01688-7. [PMC10625248]
growth_records.snippet: the thiosulfate amendment resulted in an approximately fourfold (2.2 µmol C m−3 d−1) increase in DIC fixation compared to the unamended control treatment (0.6 µmol C m−3 d−1)
growth_records.notes: Thiosulfate (1 uM) amendment DIC (inorganic carbon) fixation = 2.2 umol C m^-3 d^-1 (fourfold over 0.6 control), measured by 14C-bicarbonate uptake, 72 h dark incubation (Fig 1). Volumetric community-level chemoautotrophic fixation rate, not per-biomass, not a single strain. Thiosulfate 1 uM is the added substrate concentration, not a measured uptake flux; sox and dsr gene transcripts upregulated up to 2- to 3-fold at 72 h. In situ temperature/pH not numerically stated.

growth_records.strain: Natural community, Labrador Sea Water (LSW), ~2000 m depth, North Atlantic
growth_records.medium: Bathypelagic seawater + 1 uM thiosulfate + 10 uM glucose + 10 uM acetate (thiosulfate + DOM)

up.method: amended 10 uM; glucose-PTS transporter transcripts upregulated >130-fold
amended 10 uM; acetate permease actP +1.2-fold and acetate kinase ackA +7-fold transcripts

growth_records.cite: Srivastava, Abhishek et al. Interplay between autotrophic and heterotrophic prokaryotic metabolism in the bathypelagic realm revealed by metatranscriptomic analyses. Microbiome (2023). DOI:10.1186/s40168-023-01688-7. [PMC10625248]
growth_records.snippet: a 12-fold (7.6 µmol C m−3 d−1) DIC fixation was observed in the thiosulfate plus DOM amendment compared to the control treatment
growth_records.notes: Thiosulfate+DOM (1 uM thiosulfate + 10 uM glucose + 10 uM acetate) DIC fixation = 7.6 umol C m^-3 d^-1 (12-fold over 0.6 control; 0.6*12=7.2, paper states 7.6 measured), by 14C-bicarbonate uptake, 72 h dark incubation (Fig 1). Includes anaplerotic (heterotrophic) DIC assimilation: pepc/pyruvate-carboxylase transcripts +3.5-fold; heterotrophic anaplerotic DIC assimilation cited as 1-15% of C incorporation. Volumetric community-level rate, not per-biomass, not a single strain. Added DOM concentrations (glucose 10 uM, acetate 10 uM) are substrate amendments, not measured uptake fluxes. Microbial [3H]-leucine incorporation was also measured (methods) but no numeric leucine rate reported in text. In situ temperature/pH not numerically stated.
